info.name: Soracom Virtual Private Gateway API
info.description: Provision and manage Soracom Virtual Private Gateways (Canal, Direct, Door, Gate), Junction packet rules, and Peek packet captures.

item.name: Delete VPG IP address map entry

variable.description: (Required) Identifier of the IP address map entry to delete (IMSI of the IoT SIM).

request.description:
Deletes an entry from the IP address map of the specified VPG.

**Warning**: The [VirtualPrivateGateway:listVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddressMapEntries API](#/VirtualPrivateGateway/listVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddressMapEntries) response includes automatically assigned entries for Gate Peers and the VPG. These entries cannot be deleted using the VirtualPrivateGateway:deleteVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddressMapEntry API.

response.name: Successfully deleted the IP address map entry.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Client side error in the request.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: The specified VPG or key does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: List VPG IP address map entries

query.description: The maximum number of IP address map entries to retrieve. The response may contain fewer entries than the specified value.
The last IP address retrieved in the previous page. Use this parameter to retrieve the next page of IP address map entries.

request.description: Retrieves the list of IP address map entries for the specified VPG.

response.name:
List of IP address map entries associated with the specified VPG.

**Warning**: The response includes not only entries added via [VirtualPrivateGateway:putVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddressMapEntry API](#/VirtualPrivateGateway/putVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddres

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Adds or updates an entry in VPG IP address map

request.description:
Adds or updates an IP address map entry for the specified VPG.

**Warning**: The [VirtualPrivateGateway:listVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddressMapEntries API](#/VirtualPrivateGateway/listVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddressMapEntries) response includes entries that are automatically assigned to Gate Peers and the VPG, but these cannot be added or updated using the VirtualPrivateGateway:putVirtualPrivateGatewayIpAddressMapEntry API.

response.name: Successfully added or updated the IP address map entry.

query.description: Tag name of the VPG. Filters through all VPGs that exactly match the tag name. When tag_name is specified, tag_value is required.
Tag value of the VPG.
Tag match mode.
Maximum number of results per response page.
The last VPG ID retrieved on the current page. By specifying this parameter, you can continue to retrieve the list from the next VPG onward.
